rule_metadata.name: bash_keylogger
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'bash keylogger' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule bash_keylogger
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'bash keylogger' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "bash keylogger"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /history\s\-a.{0,1000}\stail\s\-n1\s\~\/\.bash_history\s\>\s\/dev\/tcp\/.{0,1000}\//

	condition:
		any of them
}
